use_cases: Display deployment or build status in CI/CD pipeline interfaces
Show task queue or job processing states in workflow dashboards
Indicate service health or availability status in monitoring tools
Show user or entity presence/activity status in collaboration apps
Visualize workflow step completion states in multi-step processes
ai_summary: A minimal status indicator dot component that displays deployment and workflow states through colored indicators. Supports five states (QUEUED, BUILDING, ERROR, READY, CANCELED) with optional text labels and proper accessibility attributes. Designed for dev-tools and SaaS applications requiring clear status visualization in dashboards and workflow interfaces.
